Adds a customizable digital clock.
§eNot for survival
clocks.advancement.root.title: Digital Clocks
door_locker.advancement.root.description:
Lock doors, trapdoors, levers and more!
A double door without a password is convenient!
door_locker.advancement.root.title: Door Locker
door_locker.converter.lore.1: Click on a locked door to make it animated
door_locker.converter.lore.2: Only the owner of Door Locker can do this
door_locker.delocker.lore.1: Use on Door Locker to delete
door_locker.delocker.lore.2: You can only remove your own Door Lockers
door_locker.door_locker.lore.1: First rename on the anvil to set the password!
door_locker.door_locker.lore.2: Now use the Door Locker on:
door_locker.door_locker.lore.3: door, trapdoor, fence gate, button or lever
door_locker.error.already_animated: This Door Locker is already animated!
door_locker.error.locked: The block is locked! Password required!
door_locker.error.no_place: There is not enough space to place the Door Locker!
door_locker.error.wrong_block: Use Door Locker on inside door/trapdoor/fence gate/button/lever!
door_locker.message.installed:
Door Locker successfully installed!
Password set to open:
hephaestools.advancement.diamond_excavat: Now you are digging up the whole sand column of sand (not only)!
Take the Ender Pearl in the second hand and send a Stone to the End!
hephaestools.advancement.diamond_vein_mi: All mined ore glows a little!
hephaestools.advancement.excavator.title: Meet, Excavator!
hephaestools.advancement.hammer.title: Meet, Hammer!
hephaestools.advancement.netherite_lumbe: In the offhand, you can also take a hoe. Do you know what it does
hephaestools.advancement.root.descriptio: Adds advanced tools that add the ability to mine 3x3 blocks, cut whole trees and harvest with a right click
hephaestools.advancement.root.title: HephaesTools
hephaestools.advancement.sickle.descript: Harvests crops by right click and replants seeds!
hephaestools.advancement.sickle.title: Meet, Sickle!
soul_link.advancement.resonating_soul.de: Now the linked item will never be lost
soul_link.advancement.root.description: Adds the Soul Link enchantment so you don't lose your items on death
soul_link.advancement.root.title: Soul Link
soul_link.advancement.unstable_soul_link: Save all inventory after death, but once
soul_link.advancement.weak_resonating_so: Weakens with each death and can become Unstable Soul Link
pokeball.advancement.catch_mob.title: Gotta catch 'em all

pokeball.advancement.root.title: Pokeball
waypoints_memory.advancement.root.descri: Create Memory Portals for fast travel
waypoints_memory.advancement.root.title: Waypoints Memory
waypoints_memory.clot_memory.lore.1: Rename to set a name for Portal Memory
waypoints_memory.error.wrong_activate: Use Clot Memory to activate the Memory Portal
waypoints_memory.memory_extractor.lore.1: Drink to extract the memory of this place
waypoints_memory.memory_portal.lore.1: Use Clot Memory to activate the portal
waypoints_memory.reset_memory_portal.lor: Use on the Memory Portal to return
xp_storage.advancement.root.description: Adds a book to store experience
xp_storage.advancement.root.title: XP Storage
xp_storage.advancement.xp_book.title: Experience is the mother of wisdom
